fa-anchor.appearanceId: nautical anchor with ring at top and horizontal cross arm with curved flukes; T-shaped anchor with loop top and downward curved ends
fa-anchor.functionalityId: pins or anchors a navigation link to a fixed position; marks a fixed reference point in a document
fa-anchor.intentId: create a stable link that stays in place; anchor content to a specific position

fa-anchor-circle-check.appearanceId: nautical anchor with a small circle containing a checkmark overlaid at bottom right; anchor shape paired with a circular tick badge
fa-anchor-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms an anchor or fixed reference is valid and verified; marks a pinned location as approved
fa-anchor-circle-check.intentId: verify that a fixed link or anchor point is correct; confirm a docked or anchored status

fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: nautical anchor with a small circle containing an exclamation mark overlaid at bottom right; anchor shape paired with a circular warning badge
fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a pinned reference point with a warning or alert; highlights an anchor with an issue requiring attention
fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert the user to a problem with a fixed link or anchor; draw attention to a flagged docked item

fa-anchor-circle-xmark.appearanceId: nautical anchor with a small circle containing an X mark overlaid at bottom right; anchor shape paired with a circular removal badge
fa-anchor-circle-xmark.functionalityId: removes or invalidates an anchor or fixed reference point; cancels a pinned link or docked position
fa-anchor-circle-xmark.intentId: delete or deactivate a fixed anchor link; unpin a docked or anchored item

fa-anchor-lock.appearanceId: nautical anchor with a padlock overlaid at bottom right; anchor shape combined with a closed lock symbol
fa-anchor-lock.functionalityId: locks or secures a pinned reference point in place; prevents modification of an anchored link
fa-anchor-lock.intentId: secure a fixed anchor so it cannot be moved or edited; lock down a pinned navigation reference

fa-angel.appearanceId: human figure with wings spread outward and a circular halo above the head; winged person silhouette topped with a floating ring
fa-angel.functionalityId: represents a saintly or benevolent character in a scene; labels angelic or spiritual content
fa-angel.intentId: indicate a heavenly or benevolent theme; mark content related to spiritual or celestial subjects

fa-angle.appearanceId: two straight lines meeting at a point forming a partial V shape open at the top; single open chevron with two converging lines
fa-angle.functionalityId: indicates a directional cue or angular measurement; collapses or expands a section by pointing
fa-angle.intentId: show directional or angular context in a geometric diagram; indicate expandable or collapsible content

fa-angle-90.appearanceId: two lines meeting at a perfect right angle forming an L shape; corner bracket shape with two perpendicular lines
fa-angle-90.functionalityId: indicates a 90-degree rotation or right-angle constraint; snaps or rotates an element to a perpendicular position
fa-angle-90.intentId: apply a right-angle transform to an object; constrain a shape or layout to 90-degree increments

fa-angle-down.appearanceId: single downward-pointing chevron formed by two short diagonal lines meeting at a bottom point; open V shape pointing downward
fa-angle-down.functionalityId: expands a collapsed section or dropdown menu; reveals hidden content below
fa-angle-down.intentId: open a dropdown or accordion panel; show more items beneath the current view

fa-angle-left.appearanceId: single leftward-pointing chevron formed by two short diagonal lines meeting at a left point; open angle bracket pointing left
fa-angle-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous item, page, or slide; moves focus or selection leftward
fa-angle-left.intentId: go back to the previous step or view; shift selection to the left

fa-angle-right.appearanceId: single rightward-pointing chevron formed by two short diagonal lines meeting at a right point; open angle bracket pointing right
fa-angle-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item, page, or slide; moves focus or selection rightward
fa-angle-right.intentId: go forward to the next step or view; shift selection to the right

fa-angle-up.appearanceId: single upward-pointing chevron formed by two short diagonal lines meeting at a top point; open inverted V shape pointing upward
fa-angle-up.functionalityId: collapses an expanded section or dropdown menu; scrolls or moves content upward
fa-angle-up.intentId: close or hide an open panel; return to the top of a list or section

fa-angles-down.appearanceId: two stacked downward-pointing chevrons one above the other; double open V shapes both pointing downward
fa-angles-down.functionalityId: scrolls quickly to the bottom or jumps to the last item; fast-forwards through content downward
fa-angles-down.intentId: jump to the end of a list or page; skip ahead quickly through content

fa-angles-left.appearanceId: two side-by-side leftward-pointing chevrons; double open angle brackets both pointing left
fa-angles-left.functionalityId: navigates to the first item or beginning of a list; fast-rewinds or jumps back multiple steps
fa-angles-left.intentId: jump to the very beginning or first page; skip backward quickly through content

fa-angles-right.appearanceId: two side-by-side rightward-pointing chevrons; double open angle brackets both pointing right
fa-angles-right.functionalityId: navigates to the last item or end of a list; fast-forwards or jumps ahead multiple steps
fa-angles-right.intentId: jump to the very end or last page; skip forward quickly through content

fa-angles-up.appearanceId: two stacked upward-pointing chevrons one below the other; double open inverted V shapes both pointing upward
fa-angles-up.functionalityId: scrolls quickly to the top or jumps to the first item; fast-rewinds content upward
fa-angles-up.intentId: jump to the very top of a list or page; skip quickly back to the beginning

fa-angles-up-down.appearanceId: two chevrons pointing in opposite vertical directions, one up and one down stacked; upward and downward angle brackets arranged vertically back to back
fa-angles-up-down.functionalityId: toggles or sorts a column between ascending and descending order; expands or collapses a vertically scrollable region
fa-angles-up-down.intentId: switch between ascending and descending sort; show that content can be expanded or collapsed vertically

fa-angry.appearanceId: circular face with furrowed inward-angled eyebrows and a downturned frowning mouth; round emoji face with angry eyebrows and scowling expression
fa-angry.functionalityId: reacts to content with an angry or upset emotion; submits a negative emotional reaction
fa-angry.intentId: express frustration or anger in response to content; leave a strongly negative reaction

fa-ankh.appearanceId: cross with a teardrop-shaped loop at the top instead of a vertical arm; T-shaped cross topped with an oval loop
fa-ankh.functionalityId: marks or labels content with an Egyptian or spiritual symbol; represents life or eternal themes
fa-ankh.intentId: indicate ancient Egyptian or spiritual symbolism; tag content with a life or eternity theme

fa-ant.appearanceId: small six-legged insect silhouette with segmented oval body, antennae, and legs splayed outward; top-down view of an ant with three body segments and multiple legs
fa-ant.functionalityId: labels or categorizes content related to insects or biology; represents a small task worker in a system metaphor
fa-ant.intentId: indicate entomology or nature-related content; represent a worker process or micro-task in a pipeline

fa-apartment.appearanceId: rectangular multi-story building facade with rows of evenly spaced windows and a centered entrance; tall block building outline with grid-like window pattern
fa-apartment.functionalityId: navigates to or represents residential or multi-unit housing content; labels apartment or building-related listings
fa-apartment.intentId: find or manage apartment or residential property information; access building or housing-related content

fa-aperture.appearanceId: circular lens opening formed by multiple overlapping blade-shaped segments arranged in a flower-like pattern; camera iris with several curved blades radiating from the center
fa-aperture.functionalityId: opens camera or photography settings; adjusts or represents lens aperture and exposure controls
fa-aperture.intentId: configure camera aperture or photo capture settings; access photography or imaging options

fa-apostrophe.appearanceId: single small raised comma-shaped mark; a lone curved punctuation mark floating at the upper right
fa-apostrophe.functionalityId: inserts an apostrophe character into text; marks a contraction or possessive in a text editor
fa-apostrophe.intentId: add a punctuation apostrophe to written content; indicate possession or contraction in text

fa-apple-alt.appearanceId: stylized apple fruit silhouette with a leaf on top and a small stem; rounded fruit shape with a bite notch and single leaf
fa-apple-alt.functionalityId: represents food, health, or nutrition-related content; labels an apple or fruit category
fa-apple-alt.intentId: access health, diet, or nutrition information; indicate fruit or food-related content

fa-apple-core.appearanceId: apple core silhouette with the central fibrous column and remnant top and bottom crowns visible; fruit remnant shape showing seeds and core after eating
fa-apple-core.functionalityId: represents waste, consumed content, or leftover items; labels a trash or remainder state
fa-apple-core.intentId: indicate a depleted or consumed resource; mark something as used up or discarded

fa-apple-crate.appearanceId: rectangular wooden crate filled with several apple shapes visible above the rim; slatted box container with round fruits piled inside
fa-apple-crate.functionalityId: represents bulk produce, inventory, or storage of items; labels a crate or container of goods
fa-apple-crate.intentId: manage or browse a collection of stored items or produce; access inventory or bulk goods content

fa-archive.appearanceId: rectangular box with a horizontal lid raised at the top and a smaller flap panel on the front; flat-lidded storage box outline with a front label panel
fa-archive.functionalityId: archives or stores selected items for long-term retention; moves content into an archive folder
fa-archive.intentId: store old or inactive content out of the main view; archive a record or document for future reference

fa-archway.appearanceId: symmetrical stone arch shape with two vertical pillars and a curved semicircular top span; gate-like opening with rounded arch and flanking columns
fa-archway.functionalityId: represents an entrance, gateway, or passage in a map or navigation context; labels architectural or location content
fa-archway.intentId: indicate an entrance or gateway to a location; mark architectural or landmark content

fa-area-chart.appearanceId: line graph with the area beneath the line filled in, rising and falling across a horizontal axis; stepped filled polygon above a baseline representing data over time
fa-area-chart.functionalityId: opens or displays an area chart visualization of data trends; toggles to an area chart view
fa-area-chart.intentId: view cumulative or trend data as a filled area graph; analyze data changes over a time period

fa-arrow-circle-down.appearanceId: circle with a downward-pointing arrow inside it; round button shape enclosing a centered downward arrow
fa-arrow-circle-down.functionalityId: downloads or moves content downward within a circular action button; scrolls down to the next section
fa-arrow-circle-down.intentId: download a file or move an item to a lower position; scroll down to see more content

fa-arrow-circle-left.appearanceId: circle with a leftward-pointing arrow inside it; round button shape enclosing a centered leftward arrow
fa-arrow-circle-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous page or moves selection leftward via a circular button; goes back one step
fa-arrow-circle-left.intentId: go back to the previous view or step; move selected content to the left

fa-arrow-circle-right.appearanceId: circle with a rightward-pointing arrow inside it; round button shape enclosing a centered rightward arrow
fa-arrow-circle-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next page or moves selection rightward via a circular button; advances one step
fa-arrow-circle-right.intentId: go forward to the next view or step; move selected content to the right

fa-arrow-circle-up.appearanceId: circle with an upward-pointing arrow inside it; round button shape enclosing a centered upward arrow
fa-arrow-circle-up.functionalityId: uploads or moves content upward via a circular action button; scrolls up to the top
fa-arrow-circle-up.intentId: upload a file or move an item to a higher position; scroll up to see previous content

fa-arrow-down.appearanceId: single straight arrow pointing downward with a triangular head and vertical shaft; bold downward-pointing arrow
fa-arrow-down.functionalityId: moves content downward or downloads a file; sorts a column in descending order
fa-arrow-down.intentId: download or move an item down; indicate a downward direction or descending sort

fa-arrow-down-1-9.appearanceId: downward arrow alongside the numerals 1 at top and 9 at bottom; directional arrow with numeric sequence from low to high going down
fa-arrow-down-1-9.functionalityId: sorts items numerically in ascending order from 1 to 9; arranges a list by number lowest first
fa-arrow-down-1-9.intentId: organize a list in ascending numerical order; sort numbers from smallest to largest

fa-arrow-down-9-1.appearanceId: downward arrow alongside the numerals 9 at top and 1 at bottom; directional arrow with numeric sequence from high to low going down
fa-arrow-down-9-1.functionalityId: sorts items numerically in descending order from 9 to 1; arranges a list by number highest first
fa-arrow-down-9-1.intentId: organize a list in descending numerical order; sort numbers from largest to smallest

fa-arrow-down-a-z.appearanceId: downward arrow alongside the letter A at top and letter Z at bottom; directional arrow with alphabetic sequence A to Z going down
fa-arrow-down-a-z.functionalityId: sorts items alphabetically in ascending A-to-Z order; arranges a list from A to Z
fa-arrow-down-a-z.intentId: organize a list in standard alphabetical order; sort text items from A to Z

fa-arrow-down-from-arc.appearanceId: downward arrow descending from the lower edge of a curved arc above; arrow exiting out of the bottom of a semicircle
fa-arrow-down-from-arc.functionalityId: exports or downloads content out of a curved or looped context; extracts an item from an arc-shaped boundary
fa-arrow-down-from-arc.intentId: pull content out of a loop or curved region; download from a circular or arced source

fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.appearanceId: downward arrow descending from the bottom of a horizontal bracket or shelf above; arrow dropping out of a top-mounted bracket
fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.functionalityId: downloads or exports content out of a bracketed or shelved container; pulls an item down from a header region
fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.intentId: download or extract an item from a top container or menu; pull content down from a bounded header

fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing away from a horizontal dotted or dashed line above it; arrow descending below a dashed boundary
fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves content below a defined boundary or threshold marker; drops an element past a dashed divider line
fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.intentId: push or export content past a boundary into a lower zone; move an item below a marked threshold

fa-arrow-down-left.appearanceId: single diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-left corner; arrow shaft running from upper-right to lower-left
fa-arrow-down-left.functionalityId: moves or resizes content toward the lower-left; navigates diagonally down and left
fa-arrow-down-left.intentId: shift or reposition an item to the lower-left; indicate downward-left directional movement

fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.appearanceId: two arrows pointing toward a center point, one from upper-right heading down-left and one from lower-left heading up-right; a pair of inward-converging diagonal arrows meeting in the middle
fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.functionalityId: collapses or compresses content inward to the center; exits fullscreen or shrinks a panel to normal size
fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.intentId: exit fullscreen or reduce an expanded view to default size; compress two panels into a centered focal point

fa-arrow-down-long.appearanceId: long straight arrow pointing downward with an extended vertical shaft; tall downward-pointing arrow with a full-length stem
fa-arrow-down-long.functionalityId: scrolls far down or navigates to the bottom of a long list; indicates a significant downward movement
fa-arrow-down-long.intentId: jump to the bottom of a long page or document; indicate a large or extended downward navigation

fa-arrow-down-right.appearanceId: single diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-right corner; arrow shaft running from upper-left to lower-right
fa-arrow-down-right.functionalityId: moves or resizes content toward the lower-right; navigates diagonally down and right
fa-arrow-down-right.intentId: shift or reposition an item to the lower-right; indicate downward-right directional movement

fa-arrow-down-to-arc.appearanceId: downward arrow entering into the top of a curved arc below; arrow tip touching and entering the interior of a semicircle
fa-arrow-down-to-arc.functionalityId: imports or downloads content into a curved or looped container; inserts an item into an arc-shaped region
fa-arrow-down-to-arc.intentId: load or pull content into a looped or curved destination; download into a circular or arced target

fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into a horizontal bracket or shelf at the bottom; arrow descending into a bottom-mounted container bracket
fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.functionalityId: downloads or saves content into a bottom container or shelf; imports an item into a bracketed destination
fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.intentId: save or download a file into a specific container; store an item in a designated bottom slot

fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward arrow with its tip landing on a horizontal dotted or dashed line below; arrow pointing down to a dashed boundary
fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves content down to a defined boundary marker; snaps or aligns an element to a dashed threshold line
fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.intentId: align or snap content to a lower boundary or guide; move an item precisely to a marked line

fa-arrow-down-to-square.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into the top opening of a square or box outline below; arrow descending into a rectangular container
fa-arrow-down-to-square.functionalityId: downloads or imports content into a box or container; saves a file into a designated square area
fa-arrow-down-to-square.intentId: save or download an item into a specific box or slot; place content into a defined rectangular container
